title: Somewhere Only We Know
why_this_song: Somewhere Only We Know by Keane (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh, simple thing, where have you gone?
I'm getting old, and I need something to rely on
So, tell me when you're gonna let me in
I'm getting tired, and I need somewhere to begin
This could be the end of everything
So, why don't we go somewhere only we know?
Oh, simple thing, where have you gone?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "somewhere" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "somewhere" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I walked across an empty land
Oh, simple thing, where have you gone?
Talk about it somewhere only we know?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I felt the earth beneath my feet

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Somewhere Only We Know", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Somewhere Only We Know", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Somewhere Only We Know" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Somewhere Only We Know" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Somewhere Only We Know" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Somewhere Only We Know", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
